caption: A person is seen in a video featuring a tabletop covered with a black mat displaying the logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM". On the table, there are several black boxes stacked vertically, each labeled with the word "OBSIDIAN" in a stylized font. A man wearing a black jacket is visible in the background, sitting at a desk with computer equipment. In the initial part of the sequence, the camera is focused on the items on the table. As the scene progresses, a hand enters the frame from the right, reaching toward the items. The perspective then shifts, showing a wider view of the room where the man in the black jacket is seated. The video concludes with the hand moving a black object across the "JASPYS" mat, while the man remains visible in the background.
